add_params.name: tenantID
add_params.description: Tenant domain/ID. Formatter reads from useSettings().currentTenant and sends as 'tenantID'.

add_params.name: ContactID
add_params.description: Graph contact id; read from API response. PS1 uses as Identity for Set-Contact/Set-MailContact.

add_params.name: displayName
add_params.description: Sent as lowercase 'displayName'; PS1 maps to 'DisplayName' parameter of Set-Contact.

add_params.name: hidefromGAL
add_params.description: PS1 uses as HiddenFromAddressListsEnabled on Set-MailContact.

add_params.name: email
add_params.description: PS1 maps to WindowsEmailAddress on Set-Contact.

add_params.name: LastName
add_params.description: NOTE: formatter sends form field 'lastName' as-is but PS1 reads $contactInfo.LastName (capital L). Matches because object property access is case-insensitive in PS.

add_params.name: Title
add_params.description: Formatter maps form 'jobTitle' → body field 'Title'. PS1 reads $contactInfo.Title.

add_params.name: State
add_params.description: Formatter maps 'state' → 'State'. PS1 maps to StateOrProvince.

add_params.name: phone
add_params.description: Formatter maps 'businessPhone' → 'phone'. PS1 maps to Phone.

add_params.name: mailTip
add_params.description: PS1 maps to MailTip on Set-MailContact.

notes: customDataformatter does significant field renaming: form fields 'jobTitle'→'Title', 'streetAddress'→'StreetAddress', 'postalCode'→'PostalCode', 'city'→'City', 'state'→'State', 'country' (autocomplete object)→'CountryOrRegion' (string value), 'companyName'→'Company', 'businessPhone'→'phone'. Also adds 'tenantID' from ambient tenant and 'ContactID' from the loaded contact object. PS1 verifies all field names match.
